payload.description: Off-board fare collection for Bx6 SBS, enabling all-door boarding

payload.claim_text: SBS has brought: 10-30% faster bus speeds, about 10% increase in ridership, more reliable service, customer satisfaction of 95%, safer streets / reduction in crashes

warnings: claim.statement is accepted as passthrough, but prefer claim_text. Claim statement.
